title: Hand-curated flagship dies — dates, package, socket, curator notes

actel_a1020b.curator_note: Actel A1020B — antifuse FPGA for rad-hard and one-time-programmed designs.

altera_ep300.curator_note: Altera EP300 — first reprogrammable EPLD; DIP-24 fuse-era logic array.

amd_am486dx4.curator_note: AMD Am486DX4 — 3× clock 486 on Socket 3; write-back cache on later steppings.

amd_athlon_xp.curator_note: Athlon XP Palomino — QuantiSpeed branding, first AMD performance lead.

amd_epyc_9654.curator_note: Genoa 96-core server — DDR5, PCIe 5, CXL attach for cloud scale-out.

amd_k6_2.curator_note: AMD K6-2 — 3DNow! SIMD debut on Super7, Cyrix/MMX rival.

amd_k6_3.curator_note: AMD K6-III — 256KB on-die L2, last great Socket 7 performance push.

amd_k7_athlon.curator_note: First AMD seventh-gen — EV6 bus beat Intel on FPU for the first time in years.

amd_k8_athlon64.curator_note: AMD64 ISA debut — x86-64 extended memory and 64-bit registers land on desktop.

amd_ryzen_9_9950x.curator_note: Zen 5 flagship — 16 cores, AVX-512 return on consumer desktop.

apple_m1.curator_note: First Apple Silicon Mac SoC — unified memory, ARM64 macOS cutover begins.

apple_m2.curator_note: Apple M2 — 5nm second-gen Apple Silicon, M2 Air/Pro efficiency tier.

apple_m3.curator_note: Apple M3 — 3nm debut, dynamic caching and GPU architecture refresh.

apple_m4.curator_note: 3nm second-gen — Neural Engine and GPU tier for iPad Pro / Mac mini wave.

arm_cortex_a72.curator_note: Cortex-A72 — ARMv8-A big core for Raspberry Pi 3 and mobile SoCs.

arm_cortex_a78.curator_note: ARMv8.2-A efficiency core — big.LITTLE phone and tablet workhorse.

arm_cortex_m55.curator_note: Cortex-M55 — Helium vector extension for IoT and edge ML.

arm_cortex_x4.curator_note: ARMv9.2 prime core — Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 and Dimensity 9300 peak performance.

capcom_cps_b_a.curator_note: Capcom CPS-B-A — CPS-1 board I/O and protection glue ASIC.

chips_2a03.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — Ricoh 2A03 NES CPU (6502 derivative) with on-die APU integrated tick.

chips_2c02.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — Ricoh 2C02 PPU scanline SIMD tile fetch for NES.

chips_6502.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — MOS 6502 opcode dispatch; Apple II, C64, Atari, NES heart of 8-bit era.

chips_6507.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — MOS 6507 Atari 2600 CPU with 13-bit address bus and on-chip clock.

chips_65816.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — WDC 65C816 SNES main CPU with HDMA and 24-bit banked addressing.

chips_68000.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — Motorola 68000 effective-address calc for Genesis, Mac, Amiga.

chips_8080.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — Intel 8080 arcade and CP/M emulation core; Altair/IMSAI lineage.

chips_fieldchips.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — FieldChips.hpp aggregator; rebuild with g++16 field_opt vectorization.

chips_sid.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — MOS 6581/8580 SID three-voice analog synthesis for Commodore 64.

chips_sm83.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — Sharp SM83/LR35902 Game Boy CPU with LCD STAT interrupt path.

chips_sn76489.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — TI SN76489 PSG square-wave period unroll for ColecoVision and SMS.

chips_spc700.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — Sony SPC700 SNES audio sub-CPU with 64KB SRAM and BRR decode.

chips_tia.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — MOS TIA television interface adaptor with entropy-scheduled Atari 2600 raster.

chips_ym2612.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — Yamaha YM2612 OPN2 FM envelope fast-math for Mega Drive.

chips_z80.curator_note: CHIPS hot path — Zilog Z80 flag-table LTO for SMS, MSX, and arcade sound CPUs.

cn_loongson_2k1000.curator_note: Loongson 2K1000 — dual-core LoongArch embedded SoC for domestic boards.

cn_phytium_d2000.curator_note: Phytium D2000 — ARM server CPU from FT-2000 domestic lineage.

cn_rockchip_rk3588.curator_note: Rockchip RK3588 — 8-core ARM + 6 TOPS NPU for SBC and tablets.

cn_starfive_jh7110.curator_note: StarFive JH7110 — RISC-V VisionFive 2 quad-core SoC.

cn_sunway_sw26010.curator_note: Sunway SW26010 — 260-core manycore for TaihuLight supercomputer.

cn_zhaoxin_kx6000.curator_note: Zhaoxin KX-6000 — domestic x86 from VIA Centaur lineage, 16nm.

coco3_gime.curator_note: Graphics Interrupt Memory Enhancer — 640×192×16 and MMU banking for CoCo3.

coco_mc6809e.curator_note: Tandy Color Computer heart — 0.89 MHz MC6809E, extended addressing on CoCo3.

commodore_8362_denis.curator_note: 8362 Denise — ECS display encoder, 4096-color HAM mode path.

cyrix_5x86.curator_note: 4× clock 486-class — budget overclock path on 3.3V Socket 3 boards.

dec_alpha_21064.curator_note: DEC Alpha 21064 — 64-bit RISC workstation CPU, NT/Alpha port era.

dimensity_9400.curator_note: MediaTek flagship — all-big Cortex-X925 cluster, TSMC 3nm mobile SoC.
